Name: Do not use unnecessary columns
Description: Unused visible columns bloat model size and confuse self-service users.

Name: Avoid bi-directional relationships unless explicitly justified
Description: Bi-directional filtering is a common source of ambiguous filter context and performance issues.

Name: Relationship keys must not be floating point
Description: Floating point join keys risk silent mismatches.

Name: Every measure must have a description
Description: Descriptions surface as tooltips in Power BI Service, making self-service reporting usable without a data dictionary.
